title: OptimizedVanilla+
description: ModPack with a stack of mods made for a perfected Minecraft experience. Afraid of performance issues? No worries! Mods such as Sodium, Lithium and ModernFix will guarantee a smooth gameplay, even with the included BSL Shaders! Tested on 2015 Hardware! ;)
body:
## Ever wanted stunning visuals without the cost of performance?
### Well, look no further!

A **stack** of mods, ressource packs and shaders will level up your _Minecraft_ Vanilla Experience.
This modpack prioritizes compatibility, performance, stability, and visuals.
**Running Integrated Graphics**? Use the included Mellow Shader for stable frame rates, even with Distant Horizons activated! **Having sound issues?** Consider disabling _Sound Physics Remastered_ ! **Distant Horizons won't load LODs (Level Of Detail)?** Set CPU Priority to _I paid for the whole CPU_ and lower how many threads are loading your vanilla chunks! (Pause Menu > Options > Video Settings > Performance > Chunk Update Threads)
